zh.lifeSummary: 當Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye於1197年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫圖南--布利時，他的父親Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie45歲，母親Sophie d'Aspremont53歲。他和Alix de Rumigny至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1248年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye于1197年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫圖南--布利时，他的父亲Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie45岁，母亲Sophie d'Aspremont53岁。他和Alix de Rumigny至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1248年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Garlande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English gerlond, ger(e)land, garlond ‘metal chaplet, crown, coronet; wreath’, probably a nickname denoting a habitual wearer of such items, or a metonymic occupational name for a maker of them.

English: perhaps from the Old French personal name Gerland (ancient Germanic Garuland, probably from garw- ‘war-gear; prepared(ness)’ + land ‘land’; the first element of the French name may instead be from a name beginning with gēr ‘spear’).

English: topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + lond ‘land’ (Old English gāra + land, lond), for someone who lived ‘(at the) triangular piece of land’. Compare Garfield .

variants.name: Gerland
meanings: English (North Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Garland  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Gartland
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Garland  .
Irish (northern Leinster and southern Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Mac Gearnúin, a patronymic from the Norman personal name Gernon .

nameMeanings.name: Anseau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Francois, Jean Pierre, Normand.

variants.name: Manceau
meanings: French: habitational name for someone from Mans, a region in Sarthe, or from Maine, a former province in the northwestern part of France. Compare   Manseau   and English   Mansell   1.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye was born in 1197, in Tournan-en-Brie, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie, was 45 and his mother, Sophie d'Aspremont, was 53. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Alix de Rumigny. He died in 1248, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye est né en 1197, à Tournan-en-Brie, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sophie d'Aspremont, avait 53 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Alix de Rumigny. Il est décédé en 1248, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye 1197 in Tournan-en-Brie, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie 45 und seine Mutter Sophie d'Aspremont 53. Er hatte mit Alix de Rumigny mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1248 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye è nato il nel 1197 nel Tournan-en-Brie, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Sophie d'Aspremont, aveva 53 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Alix de Rumigny. Morì nel 1248, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssayeが1197年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルントウルナン-エン-ブリーで生まれた時，父Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brieは45歳，母Sophie d'Aspremontは53歳であった。彼はAlix de Rumignyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1248年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye(이)가 1197년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루 토우른아--브리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophie d'Aspremont(은)는 53세였다. 그는 Alix de Rumigny(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye nasceu em 1197, em Tournan-en-Brie, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Sophie d'Aspremont, tinha 53 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Alix de Rumigny. Ele faleceu em 1248, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye родился в 1197 г. в местности тоурнан-ен-бри, мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie d'Aspremont, 53. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Alix de Rumigny. Он умер в 1248 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anseau IV de Garlande de La Houssaye nació en 1197, en Tournan-en-Brie, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Anseau III de Garlande de Tournan-en-Brie, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Sophie d'Aspremont, tenía 53 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Alix de Rumigny. Murió en 1248, a la edad de 51 años.
